EmailTemplate.description: Rejection email when UR is submitted and there is an issue with it
EmailTemplate.name: Utilization Report Rejection Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Warning: Utilization Report For Aircraft MSN {!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c} Has Been Rejected
EmailTemplate.textOnly: Dear Sir, The Utilization report for aircraft (MSN {!leaseworks__Aircraft__c.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c})for {!leaseworks__Utilization_Report__c.leaseworks__Month_Ending__c} has been rejected due to the incomplete data provided. Your urgent attention to this matter is sincerely appreciated by logging onto http://login.salesforce.com. Yours sincerely, Company Management
